content: whisper.cpp Metal+SPM integration: whisper_full is synchronous/blocking; calling on MainActor freezes UI. Must use Task.detached or GCD global queue with withCheckedContinuation. SPM lacks bridging headers for Metal shaders requiring .unsafeFlags or custom Package.swift. SwiftWhisper (exPHAT/SwiftWhisper) is a pure-Swift wrapper avoiding most bridging pitfalls. whisper.swiftui example #1720 shows runtime transcription failures in SwiftUI context.
